form.formComment: Recent form sound. At the latest run favourite; came home strongly from last on the turn and won by a head at Mt Gambier Bm66 March 22 over 1200m defeating Hasta La Chilly carrying 59.5kg at $3.10. The start before that 4th of 9 at Wangaratta Bm70 on February 28 over 1300m, 1.3 len behind Taung carrying 58kg at $4.40. Solid prospects again and a good stall doesn?t hurt.
